criteriaResults.evidence: EffortSchema (low|medium|high|xhigh|max) + BudgetSectionSchema ({maxUsd positive|null, optional}) attached as optional fields to Planner/Curator/Generator/Evaluator sections. 24 new schema tests: no defaults injected, valid/invalid values, null maxUsd, minimalBase fixture parses unchanged. 62/62 in schema.test.ts.

Loop spreads ...(effort !== undefined ? {effort} : {}) at the maxTokens site. anthropic.ts UNTOUCHED (output_config forwarding pre-existed). Tests capture client.lastParams: effort forwarded when set, Object.hasOwn false when unset.

budget.chargeTokens/chargeUsd once per turn after usage accumulation; on exceeded() returns partial result mirroring max-turns shape with stopReason 'budget_exceeded', never throws. Test: 2 turns at 0.6 USD vs maxUsd 1.0 -> stopReason budget_exceeded, turnsUsed 2, callCount 2, assertWithinBudget spy never called.

totalCostUsd accumulates only when turns report costUsd; conditional spread on ALL FOUR return sites (error, budget_exceeded, completion/refusal, max_turns). Tests: sums 0.75/1.2/200 present; Object.hasOwn false when no cost.
pipeline.ts sprint-passed event conditionally spreads lastGeneratorResult?.costUsd into details (HistoryEntry.details is z.record, no schema change). history.test.ts round-trips with/without costUsd.

generator-agent.ts reads config.generator.effort + budget.maxUsd via new exported budgetFromMaxUsd(maxUsd) helper (workflow/budget.ts); passes both conditionally into runAgenticLoop. Mocked-dep tests spy on actual invocation args: no effort/budget keys when config omits both; Budget with remainingUsd()===3 when maxUsd=3; NOT constructed when maxUsd null.

filesChanged.description: EffortSchema + BudgetSectionSchema attached to 4 per-role sections.
AgenticLoopParams effort/budget; AgenticLoopResult costUsd; per-turn charging; graceful budget_exceeded return.
GeneratorResult.costUsd; config-driven effort/budget wiring via budgetFromMaxUsd; costUsd on all parseGeneratorResult paths.
Mocked-dep sc-3-6 suite (vi.hoisted, evaluator-agent.test.ts convention); 8 new tests.

commits: b9c936c - bober(sprint-3): loop wiring for per-role effort, USD budget ceiling, cost persistence
notes: anthropic.ts untouched (effort forwarding pre-existed). assertWithinBudget/BudgetExceededError untouched for workflow interpreter (ADR-4). bober.config.json NOT modified (dogfooding declined). Suite 3731->3770 (+39), zero regressions. budgetFromMaxUsd satisfies the shared-helper language of sc-3-6; other roles not wired (out of scope).
